meaning: n.守护神,守护圣徒adj.保护(人)
examples: The Republic, like the Greek polis, was a kind of tutelary association.
The tutelary gods of Mazu and Wind - accompanying Ear are enshrined and worshiped in the temple gate.
This tutelary theory is a pure mathematical fiction. From the start it has been founded on a formidable abstraction.
The family priests immediately decided that if the boy lived they would declare the kite kuldevata, tutelary goddess of his family.
Brazil's democratic constitution gives the army vague tutelary powers.
